amendment.description: An amendment numbered 49 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to remove costly, overreaching emissions mandates on farm equipment that drives up expenses for farmers and consumers.
amendment.purpose: Amendment removes certain emissions standards on farm equipment.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Spartz amendment (A029) Agreed to by recorded vote: 215 - 213 (Roll no. 152).

action.text: Roll call votes on amendments in House
House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Spartz amendment (A029) Agreed to by recorded vote: 215 - 213 (Roll no. 152).
